    The AI model used for analysis

    Maximum response length (256–32768)

    Creativity vs determinism (0=deterministic, 2=creative)

    Nucleus sampling threshold (0–1)

    Provider Setup Help & Guidelines
    Current Provider Chain and fallback behavior from live backend status
    Current Provider Chain: Primary: OpenAI. Fallback: Gemini.
    Active Provider: Unknown
    How To Add More Providers
    • Add provider API keys in App Service environment variables.
    • Restart backend and refresh provider status here.
    • Confirm new provider appears in chain and run test analysis.
    Recommended Configuration Policy

    Use deterministic settings for scoring and always keep at least one fallback provider available.
